## Summary
<!-- One paragraph: what is vulnerable, where it was found, and the severity. -->

## Finding Details

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Severity | <!-- Critical / High / Moderate / Low / Info --> |
| Source | <!-- Dependabot / Amazon Inspector / Pen test / Manual review --> |

| Location | <!-- File path or resource ARN --> |
| CVE / Finding ID | <!-- e.g. CVE-2024-XXXX or Inspector finding ID --> |
| First observed | |
| Owner | |

## Impact
<!-- What can an attacker do? What systems are affected? -->

## Remediation

### Recommended fix
<!-- e.g. upgrade to version X.Y.Z, apply patch, rotate credentials -->

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Vulnerability resolved or mitigated
- [ ] Verification scan shows finding is cleared
- [ ] CI passes with fix applied
